raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need diff -u -0? Actually unified context 0 lines: diff -U0 file1 file2. Count differing lines: diff -U0 file1 file2 | grep -c '^+'? But diff output includes context lines? With -U0, only changed lines prefixed with + or -. We want number of differing lines: count of lines starting with '+' or '-' excluding the diff header lines. Use grep -c '^[+-]' but need to exclude the diff header lines that start with '---' or '+++'. Those start with '---' or '+++', not '+' or '-'. So grep -c '^[+-]' works. So command: diff -U0 /workspace/dir1/terminate.txt /workspace/dir1/long.txt | grep -c '^[+-]'

So command: diff -U0 /workspace/dir1/terminate.txt /workspace/dir1/long.txt | grep -c '^[+-]'
